title: Remove non-functional PageUp/PageDown scroll buttons
action: Remove the pageup/pagedown scroll buttons and the .key-scroll style. Verified live that herdr keeps no scrollback for the alt-screen TUI agents (max_offset_from_bottom=0 everywhere) and scroll keys do not move the view, and the desktop cannot scroll them either, so the buttons do nothing. Keep the arrow/enter/space/esc keys, the switch buttons, and touch scrolling.

truths: The rest of the keys pad and touch scroll are unchanged
artifacts: terminal.ts keys pad without scroll buttons
prohibitions: Do not touch the arrow/enter/space/esc keys or the switch buttons

verify: cd web && npm run bundle && npm run test -- --run

trace.outcome: Removed the non-functional pageup/pagedown scroll buttons; verified no herdr scrollback exists for the TUI agents
trace.verify_output: bundle ok (js hash back to pre-scroll-keys Utt9CHvQ); vitest 20 passed
trace.verify_command: cd web && npm run bundle && npm run test -- --run
